title: strepsilobus scandens
intro: Strepsilobus scandens, also known as the climbing Strepsilobus or Morning Glory, is a perennial climbing plant native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, sore throat, and digestive problems, offering health benefits such as pain relief, immune system support, and antimicrobial protection. Herbal preparations of Strepsilobus scandens include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
